Home › Apps › Revit Copilot
Revit add-in · Revit 2022 → 2026 · Windows

Revit Copilot

An AI engineer that lives inside Revit and runs the model with you.

Talk to Revit. The Copilot understands your model, applies your standards, and runs the 163 commands and 191 tools that ship with the platform.

Download the add-in → Watch a demo
163Revit commands one prompt away
191MCP tools the agent can chain
18×faster than manual on coordination tasks
0context switches — never leave Revit

AI Revit add-in for MEP engineers

The Revit Copilot installs as a Revit add-in that exposes 163 commands and 191 MCP tools to a chat-based agent running inside the model. Ask it to extend connectors, place SVPs, snap families to walls, run a clash report, build schedules, or any combination of those — and it will pick the right tools, ask only the questions a senior engineer would, and execute the work as a transactional Revit operation with one-click undo.

For an MEP designer, this typically removes 10 to 18 hours per project from manual ribbon-clicking, parameter copy-pasting and schedule cross-checks. For a coordinator, it cuts a typical clash-resolution loop from a half-day to under an hour, because the agent is reading the model continuously rather than waiting for a human to spot the issue.

Across a Stage 3 MEP package on a typical mixed-use scheme, teams using the Copilot ship the same scope in 35–45% less Revit time than teams without it.

Revit Copilot will be the only AI engineer that lives natively inside Revit, runs the platform's commands as a senior would, and shows its working on every change.

From manual Revit modelling to AI-assisted MEP design

What working looks like today versus with Revit Copilot.

Before

Click through ribbons. Memorise plug-ins. Copy parameters by hand. Hope the schedule matches the model.

After Revit Copilot

Ask. The Copilot picks the right tool, asks the questions a senior would, and writes the result back to the model — already coordinated, already scheduled, already QA'd.

Deep Revit integration with an audited, reversible tool surface

It's not a chat window stitched onto Revit. It's a deeply embedded agent with read/write access to your model through a typed, audited tool surface. Every action is reversible. Every decision is explainable.

Features

What Revit Copilot does. Each line is a shipped capability.

Talk-to-Revit A docked chat panel in Revit. Ask in plain English; the Copilot picks the right tool and does the work.
Runs 163 Revit commands Every shipped command — extend connectors, place SVPs, snap to walls, build schedules — callable from chat.
Drives 191 MCP tools Read tools (queries) and action tools (writes) the agent can chain into multi-step operations.
Cross-discipline coordinator Drainage, ventilation, lighting, mechanical, electrical, public health, fire alarm — all in one agent.
House-standards aware Reads office templates, parameter conventions and naming rules. Applies them automatically.
Audited + reversible Every write wrapped as a Revit transaction. One-click undo on anything the agent did.
Workshare-aware Works on local + central models; respects worksets and ownership.
Live model reading Queries the model in real time. No exports, no snapshots, no stale data.
Shows its working Surfaces every element it touched and every parameter it changed before you accept the change.

Install & system

Where Revit Copilot runs, what you need, and how to get it.

Revit 2022 Windows 10/11 · .addin auto-loaded
Revit 2023 Windows 10/11 · .addin auto-loaded
Revit 2024 Windows 10/11 · .addin auto-loaded
Revit 2025 Windows 10/11 · .addin auto-loaded
Revit 2026 Windows 11 · .addin auto-loaded

Requirements

  • Revit 2022 or later, 64-bit, with admin rights for first install.
  • MEP Bridge installed (bundled with the Copilot installer).
  • Internet connection (the agent runs in the cloud; the model stays local).
  • An Adelphos account.

Sign-in

Sign in once via Adelphos Chat; the Revit add-in inherits the session.

Download Revit add-in (.msi) → Read the docs first

Built for MEP designers and BIM coordinators inside Revit

MEP designersBIM coordinatorsEngineers who live in Revit

Related

App Adelphos Chat Same agent. Same project context. Browser, phone, or desktop. The Adelphos Chat is the agent untethered from any one tool. App Specbuilder Specbuilder reads the model, applies your office standards, layers your preferred manufacturers, and produces a stage-appropriate specification — ready for issue. Agentic service Revit Modelling Agent Email a markup, receive the Revit model update.

Frequently asked questions

Quick answers AI engines (and humans) can pull from.

What is Revit Copilot?

Talk to Revit. The Copilot understands your model, applies your standards, and runs the 163 commands and 191 tools that ship with the platform.

What does Revit Copilot do?

The Revit Copilot installs as a Revit add-in that exposes 163 commands and 191 MCP tools to a chat-based agent running inside the model. Ask it to extend connectors, place SVPs, snap families to walls, run a clash report, build schedules, or any combination of those — and it will pick the right tools, ask only the questions a senior engineer would, and execute the work as a transactional Revit operation with one-click undo.

How is Revit Copilot different from the manual workflow?

Without Revit Copilot: Click through ribbons. Memorise plug-ins. Copy parameters by hand. Hope the schedule matches the model. With Revit Copilot: Ask. The Copilot picks the right tool, asks the questions a senior would, and writes the result back to the model — already coordinated, already scheduled, already QA'd.

How much time does Revit Copilot save?

Headline outcomes for Revit Copilot: 163 (Revit commands one prompt away); 191 (MCP tools the agent can chain); 18× (faster than manual on coordination tasks); 0 (context switches — never leave Revit).

What platform does Revit Copilot run on?

Revit add-in · Revit 2022 → 2026 · Windows

Who is Revit Copilot for?

MEP designers; BIM coordinators; Engineers who live in Revit.

How do I get Revit Copilot?

Self-serve: Download the add-in at /dist/downloads/index.html. No sales call required.

Ready to put Revit Copilot to work?

Self-serve install. No sales call, no walkthrough required.
